coreFixes: Patched runtime crash in monetization analysis (`context` initialization in `analyzeRevenue`).
Reworked failing domain validators to Playwright UI-only flow (removed static source assertions and direct engine calls).
Updated platform truth flow to validate reachable UI surfaces for revenue, marketplace, and enterprise.
Hardened marketplace validation to execute real create/edit/delete/apply behavior.
Aligned threat and sentinel checks with System workspace entry points and runtime diagnostics.
Aligned hero validation to real Hero Manager options and live hero behavior updates.
Kept appearance validation focused on visible theme application + persistence.
